name: Sunshine Guojian Pharmaceutical (Shanghai) Co., Ltd
summary: Sunshine Guojian Pharmaceutical (Shanghai) Co., Ltd is a China-based biopharmaceutical company focused on the research, development, manufacturing and commercialization of innovative antibody drugs. The company's products target major diseases, including cancer and autoimmune diseases. Sunshine Guojian Pharmaceutical (Shanghai) Co., Ltd is headquartered in China.
